name: Ham and Potato Chowder
recipeIngredient: 4 medium Potatoes, washed, peeled and cubed (3 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 3-1/2-quart saucepan.
2. Saute onion and green pepper until tender.
3. Add potatoes, 2 cups water, salt, paprika, and pepper to the pan. Cover and simmer about 15 minutes, or until potatoes are tender.
4. In a small bowl, combine flour and 1/3 cup water; blend well. Stir this mixture into the potato mixture.
5. Add milk. Simmer until slightly thickened, stirring frequently.
6. Add corn and ham; heat through.
7. Sprinkle each serving with parsley.
